title: aurinia rupestris subsp. cyclocarpa
intro: Aurinia rupestris subsp. cyclocarpa, also known as the Alpine Sweet Rocket or Alpine Rocket, is a plant species of the genus Aurinia, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and succulent leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aurinia rupestris subsp. cyclocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
